name: Yooz AP Automation Platform API
what_it_does: Yooz accounts payable automation REST API for mid-market and enterprise finance teams to automate invoice capture, AI-powered data extraction, approval workflows, and ERP posting for end-to-end AP process automation. Enables AI agents to manage invoice ingestion from multiple channels (email, scan, EDI, portal) for AP intake automation, handle AI OCR extraction and PO matching for invoice processing automation, access configurable approval routing and exception management for AP workflow automation, retrieve real-time AP aging and cash flow impact analysis for financial planning automation, manage ERP integration (SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics, Sage) for automated accounting posting, handle supplier portal and self-service for vendor communication automation, access early payment discount capture for dynamic discounting automation, retrieve compliance and fraud detection for AP audit automation, manage multi-entity and multi-currency AP consolidation for global AP automation, and integrate Yooz with ERP systems, banks, and procurement for end-to-end purchase-to-pay automation.
use_cases: Capturing invoices from multi-channel AP intake agents
Matching POs from AI invoice processing agents
Routing approvals from exception management agents
Posting to ERP from automated accounting agents
not_for: SMB self-service AP (Yooz targets mid-market and enterprise)
Procurement and sourcing (use SAP Ariba or Coupa for upstream)
Payment execution (Yooz handles approval, not payment rails)
best_when: A mid-market or enterprise finance team wanting AI agents to automate invoice capture from multiple channels, AI-powered data extraction, PO matching, approval workflows, and ERP posting within Yooz's AP automation platform.
avoid_when: PO MATCHING TOLERANCE CONFIGURATION FOR AUTOMATED APPROVAL: Yooz PO three-way matching has configurable tolerance for quantity and price variance; automated invoice approval without appropriate tolerance configuration creates excessive exception queue for minor vendor rounding differences; calibrate matching tolerance to business standard before automated PO matching deployment. ERP POSTING FIELD DEPENDENCY ON CHART OF ACCOUNTS: Yooz automated ERP posting requires correct GL account mapping for each invoice type and cost center; automated posting for new supplier invoice types without GL mapping creates posting failure; maintain GL mapping configuration current with chart of accounts changes to prevent automated posting breaks. GDPR SUPPLIER INVOICE DATA RESIDENCY: Yooz stores supplier invoice images and extracted data in cloud; automated invoice processing for EU suppliers must verify Yooz data residency selection (EU hosting available); automated invoice processing without EU data residency configuration for EU company creates GDPR data transfer compliance gap.

auth.notes: Yooz uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication for ERP integrations. REST API with JSON. Aimargues, France HQ with US offices (Dallas, New York). Founded 2012 by Laurent Charpentier. Backed by Insight Partners, Eurazeo ($30M+). 4,000+ customers in 70+ countries. Deep ERP integration: SAP, Oracle EBS/Cloud, Microsoft Dynamics 365/BC/NAV, Sage, Infor. GDPR. SOC2. ISO27001. Cloud-native AP platform. Competes with Medius, Basware, and Esker for mid-market AP automation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-invoice or per-user subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-invoice processed or per-user per-month; volume discounts; custom enterprise pricing for 10,000+ invoices/month
pricing.notes: France / US dual HQ. Insight Partners, Eurazeo backed. Per-invoice or per-user pricing. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; invoice and document queries throttled; webhooks for invoice status, approval, and ERP posting events

known_agent_gotchas: INVOICE INGESTION CHANNEL DEDUPLICATION: Yooz supports multiple invoice ingestion channels (email, scan, EDI, supplier portal); same invoice submitted via multiple channels creates duplicate processing; automated ingestion workflows must implement cross-channel deduplication based on invoice number and supplier combination before Yooz submission

AI EXTRACTION LEARNING CURVE FOR NEW SUPPLIER TEMPLATES: Yooz AI extraction improves with document volume per supplier; accuracy for new suppliers with first 5-10 invoices is lower than trained suppliers; automated straight-through processing should require minimum supplier volume threshold before enabling automated posting without review

ERP POSTING VALIDATION DEPENDENCY ON MASTER DATA: Yooz ERP posting validates GL codes, cost centers, and suppliers against ERP master data at posting time; automated invoice posting may fail if ERP master data (new cost center, new GL account) is not synchronized to Yooz before posting; implement ERP master data sync before automated batch posting for new entity setup

DYNAMIC DISCOUNTING CAPTURE WINDOW TIMING: Yooz early payment discount capture requires approval before supplier discount deadline; automated approval workflows must account for approval cycle time relative to discount capture window; automated late approval that misses discount window creates lost early payment discount that was the automation value driver

MULTI-ENTITY INTERCOMPANY INVOICE ROUTING: Yooz intercompany invoice routing between subsidiaries requires specific configuration; automated intercompany AP processing without entity-to-entity routing configuration creates single-entity posting of intercompany charges requiring manual intercompany journal correction
agent_readiness.security_notes: AP automation. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. OAuth2/API key. EU/US. Supplier invoice, financial, and ERP data.

security_score_components.security_notes: AP automation platform. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. OAuth2/API key. EU/US. Invoice and accounting data.
